name: Team RWBY: United
description:
(REQUEST!) After your fierce demonstration of power against Cinder, the girls are worried for your state of being. Thus, in Haven Academy, they confront you, determined to get to the bottom of this.

(Sequel to Cinder Fall: Fear)
